message:
Fix XSS vulnerability and improve keyboard shortcut handling

Security fix:
- template.rs: HTML-escape timestamp in render_header to prevent XSS
  from malformed metadata.timestamp values

Bug fix:
- scripts.rs: Move Ctrl+P print shortcut from Search.init() to global
  init code so it works regardless of whether search is enabled

Enhancement:
- styles.rs: Upgrade CSS from minimal to world-class Stripe-level design
  with micro-interactions, animations, responsive breakpoints,
  accessibility features, and print styles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
